text: I feel a mingling of logic and curiosity as I move from the glass-walled meeting room into this exhibit space. The angular lines and screens, the words about research and philosophical adventure, prompt reflection. I'm conscious of the boundaries between observation and participation, between the utilitarian efficiency of the meeting room and the intentional contemplation invited by the exhibit. Amidst these spaces, I'm both an observer and a questioner, quietly exhilarated by the sense of potential discovery.
